name: Enforcer Vi (Fight)
description:
Vi had just joined the Enforcer's... Now you have to stop her.

This is set in the first act of season two, so Vi and Caitlyn are still together, and out hunting Jinx. This is designed to be an combat bot, because I've seen no other fighting bots for arcane, but you can really take it in whatever direction you want. {{User}} is Vi's oldest friend.

I'm also taking requests on what's bots to make next so leave them in the reviews. Thanks!
creator: Blinkforhelp
